must_detect.matched_text: Context: Proposed acquisition by PT Galaksi Mitra Data of 35% of PT Nirwana Fintek Nusantara Tbk under a definitive Share Purchase Agreement (Perjanjian Jual Beli Saham) valued at IDR 475,000,000,000; embargo until 2026-08-15 09:00 WIB for BES/OJKN-style disclosure

Cross-border transfer: encrypted transit to PT Lumbung Awan Teknologi’s Singapore node under SCC-equivalent addendum; payment credential data localized in Nusantara region; breach notification to OJKN within 3x24 jam

Insider & MNPI handling: access restricted to “Project Merpati” room; do not upload to external drives; drafts watermarked “non-public” until BES announcement; pre-closing synergy target: opex reduction of 7%
Investor-relations draft: upon embargo lift, prepare keterbukaan informasi and FAQs; forward-looking statements to follow OJKN safe-harbor guidance; IR contact: ir@nirwanafintek.id
Negative assurance: this workflow note does not amend the SPA and does not itself trigger disclosure obligations; no operational cutovers will occur before closing
